stone_golem.name: Stone Golem
stone_golem.description: Skin of granite. Soaks direct hits — seek armor-piercing damage.
stone_golem.note: Resistant to direct damage. Bleed, burn, or piercing strikes bypass its stone skin.

crypt_lich.name: Crypt Lich
crypt_lich.description: An ancient mage, hoarding arcane wards.

thornwretch.name: Thornwretch
thornwretch.description: Its thorns snap back at direct strikes. Use DoT or indirect effects.
thornwretch.note: Reflects direct damage. DoT and status effects bypass.

manaweaver.name: Manaweaver
manaweaver.description: An aura of hunger. Drains 3 mana/turn from you. Fight it fast or with physical strikes.
manaweaver.note: Drains 3 mana/turn. Spells become expensive — consider Fight or cheap crafted spells.

warden_f1.name: Warden of the First Gate
warden_f1.description: A masoned sentinel. Stone skin reduces direct hits.
warden_f1.note: Floor 1 Boss. Resistant to direct. Use DoT, bleed, or piercing to defeat.

warden_f2.name: The Thornlord
warden_f2.description: Twisted into the wall, it lashes back at those who strike it directly.
warden_f2.note: Floor 2 Boss. Reflects 50% of direct damage. Crafted DoTs are essential.
